bikes.description: Light grey, lettering is purple. 8 speed.  Wasn't shifting well at time of theft.  A little on the heavy side for a mountain bike.
bikes.title: 2016 Cannondale Foray 3 Womens

bikes.description: It is an Apollo/Kuwahara bike, the bike has both manufacturers' names on it. It is a brown, pale yellow, chrome vintage mountain bike with most of the hardware original. The saddle was changed out for a brown saddle, it has a newer chain, newer MEC grips, and a rat-trap style bike rack. The shifters are friction thumb shifters. Overall, the bike is in great condition minus some paint scuffs.
bikes.title: 1984 Kuwahara Aries

bikes.description: My Van Dessel Ramble Tamble Mountain Bike was stolen last night in Fort Worth after a group brought a 30 foot ladder to reach my balcony and stole the bike while bringing it down to the street below. Please let me know if anybody sees it. If you see this exact bike which is very customized please let me know. The bike has white Look pedals, a red colored frame, SRAM components, and a Fox front suspension as well as a specialized water bottle cage. Please see photo below for a similar looking bike. Mine has black sidewalls on the tires.
bikes.title: 2021 Van Dessel Ramble Tamble

bikes.description: The bike may still have the phone mount on the right side of the handlebar. Says "GT" on the bottom part of the frame, and "avalanche" on the bottom part.
bikes.title: 2018 GT Bicycles Avalanche sport 29 men's mountain bike

bikes.description: It is a second-hand bike that my brother fixed up for me. White Water Bottle Holder. I had it for less than 3 days! It's a mountain bike, red with a low seat and Schwinn on the side. Kind of an older bike I think. The first pic is the bike locked up at home, the second, a bike that looks similar.
bikes.title: Schwinn Frontier

bikes.description:
Predominantly grey mountain bike with white stripes on frame, with SCHWINN in larger grey letters along the white of the bottom drop bar. The front shocks are pink, with Sr Suntour written along the sides. The white words "conversion" appear on a purple background just below the rear brakes. 

Used daily and often parked in the University of Alberta, Whyte Avenue, and River Valley areas. Rider usually wears a blue helmet. 

Will soon be outfitting with a U-Lock and cable, rechargeable front and rear light, bell, front and rear fenders, and a rear rack. 

Factory description of specs is as follows (all main bike parts are original):
Schwinn Conversion Women's Mountain Bike features a 16.5" (42 cm) aluminum frame,
26" (66 cm) tires,
24 speed Shimano EZ-Fire shifters,
Shimano Tourney front derailleur,
Shimano Altus rear derailleur,
Promax alloy dual linear pull rim brakes,
Suntour suspension fork,
Suntour alloy crank,
36 spoke wheels,
Maximum Weight: 225 Ibs (102 kg).

Serial number found below bottom drop bar at the base of the pedal attachment area.
bikes.title: Schwinn 16.5" Conversion Sr Suntour

bikes.description:
Mostly white with orange letters black outlining.
Battery pack on back rack & wrapped in black and white wallpaper.
front light  & phone holder on left side.
bikes.title: 2021 Ecotric leopard super Mountain bike e-scooter

bikes.description: Extra Large frame. Had a fender over the back tire, a zipper pouch attached to frame, and black handlebar grips at time it went missing.
bikes.title: 2014 Giant Talon

bikes.description: Navy frame with lime green text on the side, may have a blue bell and wire bottle holder attached. Probably not worth much since the left-hand gear switch doesn't work very well, but it has a lot of sentimental and personal value.
bikes.title: 1999 Rocky Mountain Bicycles Fusion

bikes.description: Full-suspension carbon-fiber 29er mountain bike with Shimano SPD pedals.
bikes.title: 2017 Santa Cruz Hightower-29-C-S-LG
2020 Transition Bikes Scout

bikes.description: Scrape/blemish on Left side of bike, above where rear shock connects to rear triangle.
bikes.title: 2014 Pivot Mach 429 Carbon

bikes.description: Black frame, distinguishing features are silver bell on left side of handle bark, silver bottle holder and  black kickstand with red dot on left side of rear wheel
bikes.title: 2019 GT Bicycles Aggressor Comp 27.5 Mountain Bike

bikes.description: Hard Tail Mountain Bike, some blue writing, but mostly matte black.  There was a single side-loading bottle cage on the down tube, which was black.  I removed the reflectors and the dork disc as well.
bikes.title: 2018 Cannondale Trail 5

bikes.description:
Kids Supercycle Mountain Bike (red and black) SC1800 24-inch. H10 Steel frame.design stickers.
Grey steel bell missing a compass on right hand side, added black supercycle wide seat, faded red sticker (right side faded on right side, vibrant red on left side), Schwinn water bottle holder. Black kick stand.
bikes.title: Supercycle SC1800 24-inch

bikes.description: it is a full suspension MTB, the main colors on the bike are orange, red, and white.
bikes.title: 2021 Polygon

bikes.description: Black frame, with black "Rocky Mountain" lettering on side  with orange writing on wheels, Blue Race Face Nylon Pedals
bikes.title: 2020 Rocky Mountain Bicycles Instinct Carbon 30

bikes.description: very bright green
bikes.title: 2021 GT Bicycles Aggressor Pro 27.5 Mountain Bike 2021

bikes.description: Full suspension, mountain bike in good condition. Minor scratches. Not bottle cage or saddle bag. Shimano Deore/SLX groupset. The bike is a UK model so the break levers are on the opposite side to Asian models left = rear.
bikes.title: 2015 Trek Remedy 7

bikes.description: Had a bell on right handlebar
bikes.title: 2020 Supercycle Outlook Dual Suspension Mountain Bike

bikes.description: Mostly factory (Rock Shox, Bontrager wheels, Shimano brakes, Crowbar handlebar).  Distinguishable features:  Street tires (not original mountain, Kenda brand I believe), phone mount with red grip on right side of handlebar (if not removed), small magnet on spoke on front wheel from previously-mounted speedometer.
bikes.title: Gary Fisher Marlin

bikes.description: Stolen Women's mountain bike, Trek brand. Approximately from the year 2013. Frame is black and has attachment for portable bike pump, bike seat is white and black, handle bars are black with teal on the handles. Front wheel shock absorbers are white with teal details. Handlebars have a black metal bell on the right side.
bikes.title: 2013 Trek

bikes.description: The seat is a black Oura Gel specialized women's seat and there is a white bottle cage that opens to the side.
bikes.title: 2014 Rocky Mountain Bicycles element 930

bikes.description:
TAN colored. Cross country mountain bike. 
Fox 34 120 mm fork. Ergon saddle. Good condition
bikes.title: 2019 Specialized Epic Evo Expert

bikes.description: Dark grey women's mountain bike with a few red and blue accents.
bikes.title: 2020 Mt. Shasta Pachanga

bikes.description:
-Folding Bike
-Wider mountain bike handlebar
-Kenda small block 8 tires
-Selle italia flight saddle (visible patch on side of saddle_
bikes.title: 2020 Zizzo Liberte

bikes.description:
~~Traits~~
-Probably does not have a kickstand, as I had taken it off.
-The reflector on the front wheel had broke off. And I had connected it with a zip tie. So the reflector may still be attached that way, or gone completely.
-One of the shift gage windows had been cracked.
-Has paint patches from me trying to fix where the paint had been scratched off. Like where my bell was, on the left side of the handle bar. Paint is shimmery black, with golden flex. If you look closely, you can tell that I had not match the paint quite right.
-The green sticker on the frame has a scratch.
-The white/black seat has a slight stain on the top.

-Bolts and disc breaks had just been cleaned of any rust. Bolts repainted.

~~Technical~~
-18" Frame
-29" x 2.25" Tires
-Disc Brakes
-Shimano "EZ-FIRE" Shifters
-21 Speed
-Mountain Bike
-Shimano Tourney Front and Rear Derailleurs
-Dual Suspension
bikes.title: 2018 CCM Alpha

bikes.description: It's a black mountain bike with front shocks. Some of the powder coating is worn off the handlebars and the metal is exposed. The rear gear shifter switch on the right side of the handlebar is broken and does not show what gear you're in.
bikes.title: 2020 REI Co-op DRT 1.1

bikes.description: Trek hybrid mountain bike, blue, black and white.  MEC light on handle bars.  White wall tires.  Rear mud flap.  Purchased at Unite Cycle South side.
bikes.title: Trek 8.6 DS

bikes.description: JAMIS KOMODO A1  19" BIKE SIZE MOUNTAIN BIKE IN SILLY PUTTY WHITE COLOR. LAST EQUIPPED WITH 27.5" TUBELESS TIRES, ERGO GE1 EVO HANDLE GRIPS, SPLIT CUSHION SEAT, HIMANO SLX 12 SPEED DRIVE TRAIN. QUADLOCK PHONE MOUNT WITH RED COLOR RELEASE TAB, RED FOOT PEDALS AND RED COLOR WATER BOTTLE HOLDER.
bikes.title: 2019 Jamis KOMODO A1 19"

bikes.description: The mountain bike has mint Race Face Chester pedals with metal spikes that match the frame and a Bontrager black left side load water bottle cage. There is no curve to the frame unlike in the manufacturer's photo.
bikes.title: Trek Marlin WSD

bikes.description: Put together by a friend from spare parts--mismatched tires, blue front fork, grey body, very sticky gears, had a bell but it was loose and could easily fall off.  Honestly, not a great bike but useful to me.  It had an orange and grey pannier was attached on the rear right side that I couldn't remove by hand--it was stolen along with the bike and may still be attached.
bikes.title: Unknown mountain bike 12 or 15 speeds

bikes.description: has Kona Wah Wah pedals
bikes.title: 2020 Santa Cruz 5010

bikes.description: Black Specialized mountain bike with red/white markings, water bottle holder, and low-profile bell.  Thule RideAlong baby seat attached to rear.
bikes.title: 2018 Specialized Pitch

bikes.description: Its a red on white mountain bike. It has 29 inch rims and tyres.
bikes.title: 2014 Polygon Cozmic

bikes.description:
Giant CRS Zero bike. Silver chrome aluminium frame with grey silver carbon fibre forks.

Silver handle bars with black grips and silver seat post with black saddle w/grey stripe at the back of the saddle.

Shimano Deore brakes and gears (both silver finish)

Giant Xero wheels with Onza Allegra 700x32C medium hybrid tyres. Black pedals

Silver chrome bell on left hand side of handlebars
bikes.title: 2009 Giant CRS Zero

bikes.description: Image of bike is not of actual bike but of image I got from the internet of a similar bike. There are many accessories that are not shown.  Other equipment added, on left side of handlebars, a mirror, round , with easy adjustment and to the right of it, a belle ringer with scratches on the bottom, bottle holder on vertical frame with no bottle,  24 gears, 3 on the left and 8 on the  right handlebar, adjustable kick stand on left rear wheel.  Seat adjusted to maximum forward position. Tires are worn, maybe 20 to 50 % left, Just don't know how to evaluate. Also has a combination lock which was not locked.
bikes.title: 2009 Rocky Mountain Bicycles Whistler 10

bikes.description: Bike is only 6 months old, bone-stock with EggBeater DH pedals. TURQ model with Fox Factory suspension and Sram GX Eagle shifters
bikes.title: 2019 Yeti SB 130

bikes.description:
BIKE DETAILED description and accessories on bike - matte black, top tube w/ grey streak, "Endurace CF SL" printed in
grey letters, w/ shimano 105 group set (rear derailleur, front derailleur (silver) mechanical break levers), 11/32 cassette
(shimano ultegra) 52/36 semi-compact front chain ring Shimano 105, 172.5 mm Shimano 105 crank set. Easton carbon fiber
handle bars with hexagonal pattern black handle bar tape. Fizik Arione R1 Versus EVO saddle (black) with the tip wrapped in
gorilla duck tape (part of the cushion has torn off). Iphone stand (with blue push release) attached to handle bar (on the right
side). "Ican aero" 35 mm wheels front and back. Ican printed in black, aero printed in white on the rim of the wheels. 28 mm
GP5000 continental tires front and back. There are specs of orange paint no the front down tube. "CANYON" printed in black
on the mid tube.

Xpedo Mountain Force Titanium/Titanium Pedals
bikes.title: 2019 Canyon bicycles ENDURACE 7.0 CF SL

bikes.description:
Raleigh Tokul mountain bike with Raleigh written in black on the side  - Picture attached
Glossy red with black detail 
Medium aluminum frame with 27.5" mountain bike wheels, SR Suntour fork, horizontal flat handlebars (not curved or riser type) with rubber grips
Valued at $800
bikes.title: 2015 Raleigh Tokul

bikes.description: Kid's mountain bike, 20"
bikes.title: 2019 Movelo Algonquin

bikes.description: Men's mountain bike.
bikes.title: Diamondback

bikes.description:
Boardman Team hardtail mountain bike. 29 inch wheels. 19inch frame. 2016 model.  Blue frame and white front rockshock forks.
Customised with SLX cranks (black) and Customised with Boardman Performance Flat Pedals 17 (black and well beaten up)
Customised with a BX Ascend branded dropper post (internally routed and with lever on left hand side)
Customised with back VELO branded seat with air hole and small rectangular orange label on rear left side.
Frame number  A0A01AG2313 (the 3rd diget is probably A but may be N or H)
Rear tire is Continental Mountain King.  Front tire a Continental X King. Rear tire is newer.
Customised with black homemade light attachment glued under the seat (may have ben removed but will be glue residue under seat)
Paintwork damaged by cable rub above right fork – clear plastic plastic protection tape has been applied there.
Top tube has 3 slight wear marks from straps suspended bag.
Front plastic mudguard secured by cable ties (left hand side cable tie secured to the fork arch is black, uncut and removable).
Had three distinctive plastic tubes secured to handle bars by cable ties (may now have been removed)
Right hand handle shows clear scrape/impact damage on its end
Right break lever bites early
General condition is OK though will show clear sign of use with various scratches and scrapes etc
bikes.title: 2016 Boardman Bikes Team MTB

bikes.description: Has purple to blue fade paint job. Has bird water bottle holder, large phone holder, purple pedals and purple tire lights. Has a tail light and headlight. Few paint chips on it from where the bike lock goes on it. Has to fyxation stickers on it under the seat on central frame.
bikes.title: 2018 Fyxation East side Fade — Midnight blue

bikes.description:
Full suspension mountain bike. Spec'd according to https://www.vitalmtb.com/product/guide/Bikes,3/YT/Capra-29-CF,22089 but with a BrandX dropper post, custom pedals and grips. Lots of scratches including black paint covering a major scratch on the right side of the fork

Note the tires and grips have both been changed since the picture was taken.
bikes.title: 2018 YT Capra

bikes.description: This bike has a chip on the non drive train side chain stay. The paint chip is on the upper side, and is about 1 inch long, and you can fully see the black underneath. Otherwise the paint job is still mostly like new, with only very few small scratches. When stolen it has a "Retallack" marsh guard on the front fork.
bikes.title: 2019 Rocky Mountain Bicycles Altitude C70
